description: A cost estimator needs three specific cross-tabulation reports generated from the HR and cost data. Create a view named DEPT_JOB_SALARY_PIVOT that pivots EMPLOYEES and DEPARTMENTS data to show total salary per department for job roles IT_PROG, SA_REP, FI_ACCOUNT, ST_CLERK, SH_CLERK, and SA_MAN using the PIVOT operator. Create a view named QUARTERLY_SPENDING_PIVOT from the QUARTERLY_COSTS table to show total spending by department and quarter (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4) using the PIVOT operator. Create a view named ANNUAL_COSTS_NORMALIZED from the ANNUAL_SUMMARY_WIDE table to unpivot SALARY_TOTAL, BENEFITS_TOTAL, EQUIPMENT_TOTAL, and TRAINING_TOTAL into rows (COST_CATEGORY, TOTAL_AMOUNT) using the UNPIVOT operator. Export the results of these views to /home/ga/Desktop/dept_job_salary_pivot.csv, /home/ga/Desktop/quarterly_spending_report.csv, and /home/ga/Desktop/annual_costs_normalized.csv. Connection: localhost:1521/XEPDB1, User: hr, Password: hr123.
